content: AutoList column resizing: use TanStack Table enableColumnResizing + columnResizeMode='onEnd'. Persist ColumnSizingState to localStorage keyed 'lk-col-widths:<schemaName>'. Add resize handle div with getResizeHandler() inside relative-positioned th. Set table-layout:fixed and getTotalSize() for table width.

fetchAppConfig caching: only cache when json.data is present (success). On fetch error or missing data, return fallback without caching so next page load retries. Prevents permanent empty admin menus after server startup glitch.

Rich text editor widget (text-rich) for text fields: uses @tiptap/react + @tiptap/starter-kit + extension-link + extension-placeholder. Registered in widget-registry as id='text-rich' for fieldTypes='text'. Resolved via widgetOverride when fieldDef.ui?.editor === 'rich' in field-renderer.tsx. Output stored as sanitized HTML. Files: capabilities/cap-adapter-ui-react/src/components/widgets/rich-text-widget.tsx, index.ts, field-renderer.tsx.

Saved filter presets for AutoList: useSavedViews hook persists named filter presets to localStorage keyed by 'linchkit:saved-views:{schemaName}'. SavedViewTabs renders tab strip above ListView. Schema-list.tsx tracks currentBazzaFilters via onFiltersChange callback to enable the save button. activeSavedView applies filter override to data before passing to AutoList.

Relation graph pattern: @xyflow/react + dagre auto-layout for schema-relationship diagrams. Split into GraphCanvas (owns ReactFlow state via useNodesState/useEdgesState) and page component (owns query + filter state). Initialize GraphCanvas state to [] then populate via useEffect to avoid useMemo exhaustive-deps lint issues. Use button element instead of div with role=button. Hidden SVG markers need aria-hidden=true to pass noSvgWithoutTitle lint. Edge types and node types must be defined outside component for stable references.
